zotero.abstractNote: We present TriFinger, an open-source robot platform designed for research in robot manipulation and reinforcement learning. The platform consists of a three-fingered manipulator, a workspace, and a software stack that allows for easy integration of learning algorithms. We demonstrate the capabilities of the platform by training the robot to perform a variety of manipulation tasks, including object pushing, grasping, and throwing. Our results show that the TriFinger platform is a reliable and versatile tool for research in robot learning.
